creation_option.description: Specifies how the snapshot was created, useful for understanding its origin.

disk_size_gb.description: Size of the snapshot disk in GB, useful for capacity planning.

encryption_settings.description: Details of encryption applied to the snapshot, ensuring data security.

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the snapshot in Terraform configurations.

os_type.description: Type of operating system associated with the snapshot, aids compatibility checks.

source_resource_id.description: Resource ID of the source disk, useful for tracking snapshot origin.

source_uri.description: URI of the source used to create the snapshot, helpful for validation.

storage_account_id.description: ID of the storage account holding the snapshot, useful for management.

time_created.description: Timestamp of snapshot creation, useful for tracking lifecycle events.

trusted_launch_enabled.description: Indicates if trusted launch is enabled, ensuring secure snapshot deployment.
